response.justification: Bogdan has an impressive technical background with over 15 years of software engineering experience, including highly relevant work building developer tools, testing frameworks, and CI/CD pipelines. However, this is a Level II Engineering Manager position requiring at least 2 years of formal people management. His resume shows a strong Individual Contributor (Staff Engineer) trajectory but completely lacks evidence of managing direct reports, conducting performance reviews, or handling 1:1s, making him unsuitable for a full-time people-leadership role.
strengths: Over 15 years of software development experience, exceeding the 8-year minimum requirement.
Strong background in engineering productivity, having built testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD pipelines, and mobile device orchestration tools.
Demonstrated technical leadership through organizing coding dojos, teaching Selenium/testing courses, and founding an open-source platform.
concerns: No documented experience in formal people management, which is a strict minimum requirement for this role.
Lacks evidence of setting organizational performance expectations, conducting 1:1s, or managing team professional development.
No mention of leading organizational change at a mid-to-senior management level.
